payload.body:
Agent implementation completed and the managed branch was pushed.

I’ll reconstruct the prior implementation from Git history, compare it with the current app-shell architecture, then reapply the behavior and run the focused tests. I’ll preserve unrelated worktree changes and won’t touch worktree management or publishing.The worktree already contains a broad, uncommitted sidebar implementation spanning config, API, desktop, and UI packages. I’m treating those edits as existing shared work: I’ll audit them rather than overwrite them, identify whether they are the lost UKN-135AP work, and repair only gaps or conflicts.I found the original branch and commit (`bd4c77de7`, “UKN-135AP add sidebar collapse toggle”). The current edits are a conflict-adjusted reapplication of that patch onto the newer base, including persistence through app config/API, the `S` then `B` shortcut, compact settings/workspace navigation, accessibility metadata, and regression coverage. Next I’m comparing it against the original patch and compiling the affected packages to catch integration drift.Focused coverage is healthy: UI (18), API (16), config (8), backend (2), and 28 of 29 selected desktop tests passed. The sole desktop failure is environmental—port `4738` is already occupied—while the shortcut, persistence, and bootstrap tests in that same run passed. I’m now running type/lint/format checks and will separately retry the port-bound test if the port becomes available.The integration checks now pass: root typecheck, lint, affected-file formatting, Storybook production build, desktop production build, and the full desktop suite excluding the one port-bound startup test (72/72). I also verified the shortcut registry has no other `S`-prefixed binding, and editable controls remain protected by the existing shortcut guard. The global formatter still reports 451 unrelated pre-existing files; all 30 ticket files themselves are correctly formatted.The reimplementation is complete and reconciled with the current package split. Persistence is covered end-to-end (config schema → backend service → HTTP contract/client → renderer cache), and repository mutations preserve the new workspace preference instead of accidentally dropping it. I’m doing one final diff/status audit now; no commit, push, or ticket transition will be performed.Implemented UKN-135AP by reconciling the original branch with the current architecture.

Key changes:

- Added an accessible header toggle with expand/collapse icons and `aria-expanded` state in [app-shell.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf542c5_lj9dj13bnqow/packages/ui/src/organisms/app-shell/app-shell.tsx:250).
- Added compact 72px sidebar layouts for workspace and settings navigation.
- Added the documented `S`, then `B` keyboard shortcut in [WorkspaceScreen.tsx](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf542c5_lj9dj13bnqow/packages/desktop/src/renderer/screens/WorkspaceScreen.tsx:646).
- Persisted `sidebarCollapsed` through app config, backend services, HTTP API, renderer client, and query cache.
- Preserved the preference during repository mutations and across navigation/reloads.
- Added shortcut conflict, persistence, accessibility, and adaptive-width regression coverage.
- Documented the shortcut in [ARCHITECTURE.md](/Users/robertpitt/.cycle/worktrees/repo_16371/worktree_mrf542c5_lj9dj13bnqow/packages/desktop/ARCHITECTURE.md:517).

Verification passed:

- Root TypeScript typecheck
- Root lint
- Formatting check for all 30 changed files
- Desktop production build
- Storybook production build
- UI: 40 tests
- API: 37 tests
- Backend: 3 tests
- Config: 18 tests
- Desktop excluding port-bound startup test: 72 tests
- `git diff --check`

The desktop startup test could not bind because the running Electron app already owns port `4738`; its other selected tests passed. The repository-wide formatter also reports 451 unrelated pre-existing formatting issues, while every ticket file passes formatting.

Changes remain uncommitted for Cycle’s handoff workflow.

Worktree: worktree_mrf542c5_lj9dj13bnqow
Handover: worktree_handover_agent_task_e773c31f1b364b7d85e7a244797dfb2d
